headline: Analyst Downgrade Puts Nike Turnaround Pace And Profit Goals In Focus
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) is under increased scrutiny after an analyst downgrade questioned the pace and scope of its turnaround under CEO Elliott Hill. The downgrade focuses on slower progress in Nike's operational and brand reset, along with concerns about margins and the credibility of current financial targets. Rising competition in premium activewear and shifting distribution trends between wholesale and direct-to-consumer channels are key pressure points. Nike enters this phase of its reset...

headline: FROM THE TRACK TO THE STREET: MUSEUM OF ARTS AND DESIGN PRESENTS EXHIBITION CHRONICLING FIFTY YEARS OF NIKE
summary: This fall, the Museum of Arts and Design (MAD) presents Nike: Form Follows Motion, marking the U.S. premiere of the first ever comprehensive museum exhibition on the world's most influential sports brand. Originated by Germany's Vitra Design Museum and curated by New York- and London-based curator, author, and historian Glenn Adamson, the exhibition traces the five decades that turned a small Oregon running company into a global cultural force. The exhibition emphasizes the importance of sports
